title: Webhook
description: A Kinde webhook — an outbound HTTPS endpoint that receives signed event notifications when resources change in a Kinde business (users, organizations, feature flags, roles, permissions, etc.).

endpoint.description: The HTTPS URL Kinde POSTs events to.

items.description: Event type key (e.g. user.created, organization.updated, user.role.assigned).

signing_key.description: Secret used to HMAC-sign event payloads.
